tracks.title: Core Foundations
tracks.description: Establish key concepts and research materials.

milestones.title: Initial Setup & Research
milestones.description: Map out goals and set up workspace environment.

tasks.title: Write down targets & resources
tasks.notes: Identify primary online resources and schedule study blocks.

tasks.title: Set up learning environment
tasks.notes: Verify code editors, package managers, and folders are ready.

tasks.title: Complete Introduction & Overview
tasks.notes: Study primary terms and basic concepts for your custom goal.

tracks.title: Practical Application
tracks.description: Build real projects and test knowledge.

tasks.title: Design a small test case or demo
tasks.notes: Test out what you have learned by making a real implementation.
